title: stelis copiosa
intro: Stelis copiosa, also known as the copious stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis copiosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Stelis copiosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
